question: Based on the chart, what can we conclude about the performance index in the last two years?

options.A: The chart does not reveal whether the index in the last two years is equal or different, because the bars exceed the displayed scale.
options.B: The index was lower in the last year than in the previous year.
options.C: The index was highest in the first year and then declined.
options.D: The index is the same for the last two years.

explanation: The y-axis maximum is below the data maximum, so the top bars are truncated and appear equal.
